name: P2-invoicing-missing-fields
description: Recurring invoice template stopped firing after a billing schedule edit. Customer has no ts steps captured - exercises the rule-fallback path because tsSteps is the empty string.
parserText:
COID/MID: 2851 / 0048-1607
CASE: ESC-2026-0515-P2D
CLIENT/CONTACT: Cedarpoint Studio LLC - Mason T.
CX IS ATTEMPTING TO: Have the monthly recurring invoice 'Studio Retainer 2026' send to the customer Aspen Bloom on the 15th of every month.
EXPECTED OUTCOME: The recurring invoice fires at 06:00 PT on the scheduled day, the customer receives a PDF invoice email, and a copy lands in Sent.
ACTUAL OUTCOME: The recurring template still shows 'Active' and 'Next run: 05/15/2026' but no invoice was created, no email went out, and the audit log has no entry for that template on 05/15/2026.
KB/TOOLS USED: Recurring transactions help article, customer's billing schedule screenshot.
TRIED TEST ACCOUNT: Not yet - customer is asking for the invoice to be sent manually first so we have not reproduced this in a sandbox.
TS STEPS:

parseFields.agentName: Triage fixture P2 invoicing missing ts steps
